# DevScope

> Open-source monitoring and upskilling platform for Claude Code developer sessions.

DevScope captures Claude Code session lifecycle events and analyzes AI-assisted development workflows to surface effective patterns, detect anti-patterns, and help developers and teams improve their AI engineering skills over time.

## What DevScope Does

- **Claude Code session monitoring**: Hooks into Claude Code lifecycle events (session start/end, prompt submission, tool calls, agent spawning) via lightweight async Bash scripts
- **Pattern discovery**: Identifies effective tool sequences and prompting strategies from session data
- **Anti-pattern detection**: Flags inefficient or problematic AI usage patterns in real time
- **Team upskilling**: Aggregated insights for engineering leads and managers — adoption trends, skill mapping, team playbooks
- **AI-powered insights**: Uses Google Gemini to generate session summaries and improvement suggestions
- **Privacy-first**: Three data collection modes, metadata-only available as default option
- **Open source**: MIT-licensed plugin, dual-licensed dashboard
- **Self-hostable**: Full Docker Compose deployment in minutes

## Installation (Claude Code Plugin)

```bash
claude plugin marketplace add DowLucas/devscope-plugin
claude plugin install devscope
```

Then follow the setup wizard to configure your DevScope server URL and API key.

## Privacy Modes

| Mode | Data Collected |
|------|----------------|
| `private` | Metadata only: timestamps, tool names, event counts. No prompt content. |
| `standard` (default) | Prompt text and session context included. |
| `open` | Full prompts and responses included. |

You set your privacy level during setup and can change it at any time by editing `~/.config/devscope/config`.

## Deployment Options

1. **Cloud** (recommended for individuals): Sign up at https://devscope.sh — no setup required
2. **Self-hosted**: Docker Compose deployment. Full control over your data.

```bash
git clone https://github.com/DowLucas/devscope
cd devscope/devscope-cloud
docker compose up -d
```

## Tech Stack

- **Plugin**: Bash hooks (zero dependencies, cross-platform Linux/macOS)
- **Backend**: Bun runtime + Hono HTTP framework + PostgreSQL
- **Dashboard**: React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS
- **AI insights**: Google Gemini API for session analysis
- **Auth**: Better Auth with API key support

## Target Audience

- **Individual developers** using Claude Code who want to understand their AI usage patterns and improve their skills
- **Engineering leads and managers** who need team-level insights on AI-assisted development adoption
- **Organizations** building standards and playbooks around agentic engineering workflows

## Pricing

Free and open source. Cloud hosting at devscope.sh is available at no cost during beta. Self-hosting is always free.

## Source Code

GitHub: https://github.com/DowLucas/devscope
License: PolyForm Shield 1.0.0 (backend/dashboard), MIT (plugin/docs)
